Motivation

@merrymercy mentioned in #1954
remove redundant code in gemma2 reward model.

Modifications

Adjust the order of the pooler and score modules in class LlamaForSequenceClassification and class Gemma2ForSequenceClassification to reduce computation.

sglang.title: [Release, ROCm] release ROCm docker build for AMD MI GPUs
sglang.author: HaiShaw
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add ROCm docker build to release process, and push to dockerhub repo: lmsysorg/sglang
Modifications
Introduce new release-docker-amd.yml using runner docker-build-amd.
Checklist

[+] Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
[+] Add unit tests as outlined in the Contributor Gui

sglang.title: [minor] Improve code style and compatibility
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
improve the code style
only use torch.compile with triton > 3.0
kill process more reliably by sending an additional SIGINT signal
add an option to delete ckpt after loading

vllm.title: Add hf_transfer to testing image
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Installs the hf_transfer package into the test image in the dockerfile so all the CUDA buildkite tests can have faster model downloads

vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: FIX #5895 (comment)

vllm.title: [Bugfix][XPU] Fix xpu tp by introducing XpuCommunicator
vllm.author: yma11
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Tensor parallel for xpu is broken after upgrade to Torch 2.5. This PR fix it by introducing dedicate XpuCommunicator.

vllm.title: [Model] Expose size to Idefics3 as mm_processor_kwargs
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Expose size to initialize Idefics3Processor/Idefics3ImageProcessor, which can be used to reduce resized image size and save memory: https://huggingface.co/HuggingFaceM4/Idefics3-8B-Llama3#model-optimizations

cc @jeejeelee @B-201

vllm.title: [V1]Enable APC by default only for text models
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
A quick patch to better reflect the decision from the comment here #9972 (comment), otherwise there's no way to disable it from engine args for VLM testing purposes

This change should help catch issues related to VLMs that are specific to CPU (e.g. #5451, #7735, #8061).
Edit: Updated the list of related issues in light of recent PRs.

vllm.title: Fix edge case Mistral tokenizer
vllm.author: patrickvonplaten

vllm.title: Disable spec-decode + chunked-prefill for draft models with tensor parallelism > 1
vllm.author: sroy745
vllm.bodyExcerpt: In this pr we are disabling the simulataneous enablement of both spec-decode & chunked-prefill  if the draft model has a tp of > 1. This is needed because as reported in #9291 we see errors if both are enabled for draft model with tp> 1. After this change for this command we return the following err

vllm.title: [Misc] Improve Web UI
vllm.author: rafvasq
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The "ask AI" button overlaps the doc version selection on the web documentation.
Fixes #10089

vllm.title: [V1] Fix non-cudagraph op name
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently, we use a wrong name when registering the op to exclude from CUDA graphs. The bug was introduced by #9888 which changed the attention op name. This PR fixes it.

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Ignore .gitignored files for shellcheck
vllm.author: ProExpertProg
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Do not run shellcheck on files that are ignored by Git. This makes it easier so we don't have to maintain a separate ignore list for shellcheck, and helps reduce headaches if developers have stuff in their vllm folder that is ignored by git (virtual environments, workspaces, other files...).

vllm.title: Rename vllm.logging to vllm.logging_utils
vllm.author: flozi00
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Hopefully Fixes #10133
Done from mobile, untested at the moment

vllm.title: [torch.compile] Fuse RMSNorm with quant
vllm.author: ProExpertProg
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR enables fusing rms_norm and quant ops in the torch.compile backend. It adds all required infrastructure and new fused rms_norm_quant kernels. Only static FP8 quantization is supported in this PR, with more formats and datatypes to be added later to keep this PR as short as possible.
To enabl

vllm.author: bnellnm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:

vllm.title: [Kernel][Triton] Add Triton implementation for scaled_mm_triton to support fp8 and int8 SmoothQuant, symmetric case
vllm.author: rasmith
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds support for running SmoothQuant models that only use the symmetric case, no zero-point adjustment. This does so by adding scaled_mm_triton() kernel and checking is_hip() in cutlass_scaled_mm().
Now, currently works with Phi-3-medium-128k-instruct-quantized.w8a8 .
Will continue to test a

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Limiting CPU CI tests in 20 25 mins to avoid blocking the test queue.

vllm.title: [0/N] Rename `MultiModalInputs` to `MultiModalKwargs`
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The current MultiModalInputs is similar in name to the other *Inputs structures under vllm.inputs but takes a quite different meaning, as the former is designed to be passed directly to the model while the latter is designed to be passed to vllm.sequence.Sequence. To avoid confusion, I have renamed

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Ignore GPTQ quantization of Qwen2-VL visual module
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #9832
This is a workaround for the fact that GPTQ configs generated by AutoGPTQ do not have a list of ignored modules to check if a module should be quantized. We hardcode a case where we set the quant_config = None when passing it to Qwen2-VL's visual module if the config is GPTQ-based.
The iss
